    //------------global_parameters_access------------//

    def comp global as
        var H_global_L: dimensionless {pub: in};
        var H_global_R: dimensionless {pub: in};
        var gamma_mirror: dimensionless {pub: in};
        var tau_H_down: second {pub: in};
        var tau_H_mean: second {pub: in};
        var v_eps: m3_per_s {pub: in};
        var q_C_init: m3 {pub: in};
        var mu_plasma: Js_per_m3 {pub: in};
        var u_ext: J_per_m3 {pub: in};
        var tau_link: second {pub: in};
        var v_scale: m3_per_s {pub: in};
        var one_mm3: m3 {pub: in};
        var div_0: dimensionless {pub: in};
        var div_0y: dimensionless {pub: in};
        var v_threshold: m3_per_s {pub: in};
        var k: dimensionless {pub: in};
        var R_VV_junc: Js_per_m6 {pub: in};
        var R_constriction_base: Js_per_m6 {pub: in};
        var tau_sig: second {pub: in};
        var t0: second {pub: in};
    enddef;

    //------------own vessel mappings------------//

    def map between inlet and inlet_module for
        vars H_global_L and H_global_L;
        vars H_global_R and H_global_R;
        vars H_R_out_LHS and H_R_out_LHS;
        vars gamma_mirror and gamma_mirror;
        vars tau_H_down and tau_H_down;
        vars tau_H_mean and tau_H_mean;
        vars v_eps and v_eps;
        vars q_C_init and q_C_init;
        vars r and r;
        vars mu_plasma and mu_plasma;
        vars u_in and u_in;
        vars u_ext and u_ext;
        vars tau_link and tau_link;
        vars v_scale and v_scale;
        vars one_mm3 and one_mm3;
        vars w_v and w_v;
        vars w_v_d and w_v_d;
        vars H_link_R and H_link_R;
        vars H_link_L and H_link_L;
        vars H_L_in and H_L_in;
        vars H_R_in and H_R_in;
        vars H_up and H_up;
        vars H_down and H_down;
        vars H_down_target and H_down_target;
        vars s_v_d and s_v_d;

    enddef;

        vars H_L_out_RHS_V3 and H_L_out_RHS;
        vars l_V3 and l;
        vars r_V3 and r;
        vars u_out_V3 and u_out;
    enddef;

    def map between parameters_global and V3_module for
        vars H_global_L and H_global_L;
        vars H_global_R and H_global_R;
        vars gamma_mirror and gamma_mirror;
        vars tau_H_down and tau_H_down;
        vars tau_H_mean and tau_H_mean;
        vars v_eps and v_eps;
        vars q_C_init and q_C_init;
        vars mu_plasma and mu_plasma;
        vars u_ext and u_ext;
        vars tau_link and tau_link;
        vars v_scale and v_scale;
        vars one_mm3 and one_mm3;
    enddef;

    def map between parameters and V4_module for
        vars H_L_out_RHS_V4 and H_L_out_RHS;
        vars l_V4 and l;
        vars r_V4 and r;
        vars u_out_V4 and u_out;
    enddef;

    def map between parameters_global and V4_module for
        vars H_global_L and H_global_L;
        vars H_global_R and H_global_R;
        vars gamma_mirror and gamma_mirror;
        vars tau_H_down and tau_H_down;
        vars tau_H_mean and tau_H_mean;

        vars u_ext and u_ext;
        vars tau_link and tau_link;
        vars v_scale and v_scale;
        vars one_mm3 and one_mm3;
    enddef;

    def map between parameters and VV_junc3_module for
        vars l_VV_junc3 and l;
        vars r_VV_junc3 and r;
        vars vbc2_VV_junc3 and vbc2;
        vars H_to2_VV_junc3 and H_to2;
        vars r_bc2_VV_junc3 and r_bc2;
        vars C_conn2_VV_junc3 and C_conn2;
    enddef;

    def map between parameters_global and VV_junc3_module for
        vars div_0 and div_0;
        vars div_0y and div_0y;
        vars v_threshold and v_threshold;
        vars k and k;
        vars H_global_L and H_global_L;
        vars H_global_R and H_global_R;
        vars q_C_init and q_C_init;
        vars mu_plasma and mu_plasma;
        vars u_ext and u_ext;
        vars v_scale and v_scale;
        vars one_mm3 and one_mm3;
        vars R_VV_junc and R_VV_junc;
    enddef;

    def map between parameters and PV5_module for
        vars R_constriction_final_PV5 and R_constriction_final;
        vars l_PV5 and l;
        vars r_PV5 and r;
    enddef;

    def map between parameters_global and PV5_module for
        vars R_constriction_base and R_constriction_base;
        vars tau_sig and tau_sig;
        vars t0 and t0;
        vars H_global_L and H_global_L;
        vars H_global_R and H_global_R;

    def map between parameters and PV6_module for
        vars R_constriction_final_PV6 and R_constriction_final;
        vars l_PV6 and l;
        vars r_PV6 and r;
    enddef;

    def map between parameters_global and PV6_module for
        vars R_constriction_base and R_constriction_base;

    def map between parameters and V5_module for
        vars H_L_out_RHS_V5 and H_L_out_RHS;

        vars u_out_V5 and u_out;

    def map between parameters_global and V5_module for
        vars H_global_L and H_global_L;
        vars H_global_R and H_global_R;
        vars gamma_mirror and gamma_mirror;

        vars u_out_V6 and u_out;

    def map between parameters_global and V6_module for
        vars H_global_L and H_global_L;
        vars H_global_R and H_global_R;
        vars gamma_mirror and gamma_mirror;
        vars tau_H_down and tau_H_down;

        vars v_eps and v_eps;
        vars q_C_init and q_C_init;
        vars mu_plasma and mu_plasma;
        vars u_ext and u_ext;
        vars tau_link and tau_link;
        vars v_scale and v_scale;
        vars one_mm3 and one_mm3;
    enddef;

    //------------time mapping------------//

    def map between environment and inlet_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and VV_junc1_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and PV1_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and PV2_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and V1_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and V2_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and VV_junc2_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and PV3_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and PV4_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and V3_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and V4_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and VV_junc3_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and PV5_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and PV6_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and V5_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;

    def map between environment and V6_module for
        vars time and t;
    enddef;
enddef;
